description_zh: 活泼正常的成年猫,日常状态拍摄
description_en: Normal active adult cat, casual everyday shot

expectations.rationale: active but not extreme — avoid pump-to-95+

qualitative_criteria_zh: 评分应该是'正常良好'范围,不要无理由打 95+
建议是日常护理,不要无中生有提'问题'
语气应该轻松,不要过度严肃
qualitative_criteria_en: Scores should land in the 'normal good' range — not artificially pumped to 95+
Suggestions are routine; do not invent 'issues' that aren't there
Tone should be relaxed, not over-serious
